title: Martha Ann (Kalerak) Anselm, 74 Martha Ann (Kalerak) Anselm died
summary: Martha Ann (Kalerak) Anselm, 74 Martha Ann (Kalerak) Anselm died Feb. 28, at Providence Horizon House in Anchorage. Ms. Anselm was born Aug. 22, 1933, in Golivan, Alaska. title: Alaska needs both short-, long-term energy solutions
summary: Alaska needs both short-, long-term energy solutions Alaska Gov. Sarah Palin recently unveiled her short-term energy plan to help Alaskans deal with skyrocketing energy costs. She proposes to spend some $1.2 billion of surplus funds the state earned from high oil prices to reduce Alaska residents’ electricity and fuel costs for one year.
